task: ok, now I think we need to create probably a skill to basically do what we did now - Im thinking we call this step ensure design consistency, and it checks for the last few pr's that changed the ui, understands what was changed, and makes sure that design and app are "synced". It could also be included to run at the end of every phase/quick/todo that includes ui work, using the already previously mentioned heuristics of whether its a ui task.
